name: BYOV Van Assignment Process
description: Complete process for assigning a new BYOV van to a technician

steps.title: Review Vehicle Documentation
steps.description: Review all submitted vehicle photos and documents

substeps.title: Review vehicle photos (front, back, left, right)
substeps.description: Inspect all submitted vehicle photos for condition and compliance

substeps.title: Verify VIN number documentation
substeps.description: Confirm VIN number is clearly visible and matches records

substeps.title: Review insurance card
substeps.description: Verify insurance coverage meets BYOV requirements

substeps.title: Review vehicle registration
substeps.description: Confirm registration is current and in technician's name

steps.title: Verify BYOV Requirements
steps.description: Confirm vehicle meets all BYOV program requirements

substeps.title: Verify vehicle size requirements
substeps.description: Confirm vehicle meets cargo space and size requirements

substeps.title: Assess overall vehicle condition
substeps.description: Evaluate if vehicle condition meets company standards

substeps.title: Verify required safety features
substeps.description: Check for required safety equipment and features

steps.title: Assign Van Number
steps.description: Assign new BYOV van number and update systems

substeps.title: Generate new van number
substeps.description: Create unique van number for BYOV vehicle

substeps.title: Update fleet management system
substeps.description: Enter new BYOV vehicle into fleet tracking system

substeps.title: Notify technician of van assignment
substeps.description: Send van number and next steps to technician
